name: Gazpacho II
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the mashed garlic and chopped onion in a blender and blend until smooth.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to the blender and blend until the mixture is smooth.
3. Cover the container and refrigerate the soup until it is thoroughly chilled.
4. Serve the soup in separate dishes with finely chopped cucumber, green pepper, tomato, onion, and croutons.
